bug_report.summary: Collapsed vertical tabs: active tab close button appears clipped/flush against the left window edge
steps_to_reproduce: Enable Sidebar and Vertical Tabs (Firefox Labs / Experimental).
Collapse the vertical tabs sidebar to the compact/collapsed state (Ctrl+Alt+Z until collapsed).
Open any page (e.g., about:config) so a tab is active.
Observe the active tab in the collapsed vertical tabstrip.
expected_behaviors: Active collapsed tab shows a close (X) button that is fully visible and properly padded within the tab button bounds (not clipped by the sidebar/window edge).
actual_behaviors: Close (X) button renders at the extreme left of the sidebar and appears partially clipped/flush with the window edge (insufficient padding/misaligned positioning).

bug_report.summary: Collapsed vertical tabs: New Tab (+) button appearance/position changes after adding close button to active tab
steps_to_reproduce: Switch/collapse the vertical tabstrip to the collapsed (icon-only) state (as shown).
Observe the New Tab (+) button beneath the active tab icon.
expected_behaviors: Adding the close button to collapsed tabs should not alter the styling/position of the New Tab (+) control.
The New Tab (+) button should render identically (alignment, padding, hit area) to pre-change behavior.
actual_behaviors: The New Tab (+) control shows a detectable visual change (rendering/position) compared to before (diff at bbox [16,137,37,161]), suggesting a layout/styling side-effect from the close-button change.

bug_report.summary: Collapsed vertical tabs: Close (X) overlay appears on multiple tabs simultaneously (including inactive tab without hover)
steps_to_reproduce: Collapse the vertical tabstrip to the icon-only (collapsed) state.
Open/activate a normal tab (e.g., click a different tab or open a new tab).
Without hovering other tabs, observe the collapsed tab buttons in the sidebar.
expected_behaviors: In collapsed mode, the close (X) should be visible only on the active tab.
For inactive tabs, the close (X) should appear only while that tab is hovered.
actual_behaviors: Close (X) overlays are visible on more than one collapsed tab button at once (diffs at bboxes [0,117,39,153] and [0,154,48,230]), indicating inactive-tab close buttons can remain visible even when not hovered.
